name: Sushang
desc: Born on the Xianzhou Yaoqing, sent to the Cloud Knights of the Luofu for military training.\nShe wields her family sword, a gift from her mother, and longs for the future she will go on to write.

1.name: Cut With Ease
1.desc: After using Skill against a <u>Weakness Broken</u> enemy, regenerates 1 Skill Point.

10000006.name: Weakness Break State
10000006.desc: When enemy targets' Toughness is reduced to 0, they will enter the Weakness Break State, which delays their actions.

2.name: Refine in Toil
2.desc: After Sword Stance is triggered, the DMG taken by Sushang is reduced by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> for 1 turn.

3.name: Rise From Fame
3.desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

5.name: Prevail via Taixu
5.desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

6.name: Dwell Like Water
6.desc: Talent's SPD Boost is stackable and can stack up to 2 times. Additionally, after entering battle, Sushang immediately gains 1 stack of her Talent's SPD Boost.

120601.name: Cloudfencer Art: Starshine
120601.desc: Deals Physical DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Sushang's ATK to one designated enemy.
120601.simple_desc: Deals minor Physical DMG to one enemy.

120602.name: Cloudfencer Art: Mountainfall
120602.desc: Deals Physical DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Sushang's ATK to one designated enemy. In addition, there is a <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak> chance to trigger "Sword Stance" on the final hit, dealing Physical <u>Additional DMG</u> equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of Sushang's ATK to the enemy.\nIf the enemy is inflicted with <u>Weakness Break</u>, "Sword Stance" is guaranteed to trigger.
120602.simple_desc: Deals Physical DMG to one enemy with <color=#f29e38ff>a small chance of triggering "Sword Stance"</color>. If the enemy has <u>Weakness Break</u>, <color=#f29e38ff>"Sword Stance" is guaranteed to trigger</color>.

10000005.name: Additional DMG
10000005.desc: Causes the target being hit to take extra DMG, which is not considered an attack.

10000006.name: Weakness Break State
10000006.desc: When enemy targets' Toughness is reduced to 0, they will enter the Weakness Break State, which delays their actions.

120603.name: Shape of Taixu: Dawn Herald
120603.desc: Deals Physical DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Sushang's ATK to one designated enemy target, and she immediately takes action. In addition, Sushang's ATK increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color> and using her Skill has 2 extra chances to trigger "Sword Stance" for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).\n"Sword Stance" triggered from the extra chances deals <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak> of the original DMG.
120603.simple_desc: Deals massive Physical DMG to one enemy, enhances "Sword Stance's" effect, and <color=#f29e38ff>takes action immediately</color>.

120604.name: Dancing Blade
120604.desc: When an enemy has their Weakness Broken on the field, Sushang's SPD increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[f2]%</unbreak></color> for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).
120604.simple_desc: When an enemy on the field has its Weakness Broken, this character's SPD increases.

120606.name: Attack
120606.desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

120607.name: Cloudfencer Art: Warcry
120607.desc: Immediately attacks the enemy. Upon entering battle, Sushang deals Physical DMG equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of her ATK to all enemies.
120607.simple_desc: Attacks the enemy. After entering battle, deals minor Physical DMG to all enemies.

1.point_desc: When current HP percentage is <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> or lower, reduces the chance of being attacked by enemies.
For every Sword Stance triggered, the DMG dealt by Sword Stance increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. Stacks up to <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> time(s).
After using Basic ATK or Skill, if there are enemies on the field that are <u>Weakness Broken</u>, Sushang's <u>action advances</u> by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

10000001.name: Action Advance
10000001.desc: Reduces the target's waiting interval before the next action.

10000006.name: Weakness Break State
10000006.desc: When enemy targets' Toughness is reduced to 0, they will enter the Weakness Break State, which delays their actions.
